content.full_text:
October 26, 2007

Carol Dean
332 Decker Street
Santa Rosa, CA 95401

Re:    You Request for Advice
        Our File No. W-07-161

Dear Ms. Dean:

Thank you for providing the information previously requested.

This will confirm that you have agreed to withdraw your request for advice given the fact that the decision you were inquiring about was voted upon without your participation at the city council meeting of October 9, 2007. Accordingly, we are closing our file on this matter.

Sincerely,

Scott Hallabrin
General Counsel

By: Valentina Joyce
Counsel, Legal Division
